## Track type

Single quality level as a sequence of segments, discriminated by media type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type Track = {
    bandwidth: number;
    segments: Segment[];
} & ({
    type: MediaType.VIDEO;
    width: number;
    height: number;
} | {
    type: MediaType.AUDIO;
});
```
**References:** [Segment](/reference/docs.segment)<!-- -->, [MediaType.VIDEO](/reference/docs.mediatype)<!-- -->, [MediaType.AUDIO](/reference/docs.mediatype)
